allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'java|dart|flutter' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path)
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'java|dart' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU, StartTime | Sort-Object CPU -Descending)
PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 31484 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'studio' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName)
PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 31484 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'studio' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName)
